# PartyLayer

> CIP-0103 compliant wallet integration SDK for Canton Network — registry-backed, verified wallets, one unified API.

## Docs

- [Introduction](https://partylayer.xyz/docs/introduction)
- [Installation](https://partylayer.xyz/docs/installation)
- [Quick Start](https://partylayer.xyz/docs/quick-start)
- [PartyLayer Kit](https://partylayer.xyz/docs/partylayer-kit)
- [Connect Button](https://partylayer.xyz/docs/connect-button)
- [Wallet Modal](https://partylayer.xyz/docs/wallet-modal)
- [Theming](https://partylayer.xyz/docs/theming)
- [Hooks](https://partylayer.xyz/docs/hooks)
- [Send Wallet](https://partylayer.xyz/docs/wallets/send)

## Resources

- [GitHub](https://github.com/PartyLayer/PartyLayer)
- [npm (@partylayer)](https://www.npmjs.com/org/partylayer)
